title: Forcebound - A Star Wars Themed Mod
description: Forcebound brings you Star Wars themed content like Lightsabers to Minecraft 1.21.4 and soon 1.21.8
body:
## _**Forcebound**_
# **IGNORE GALLERY RECIPES FOR ITEMS, MODRINTH IS BUGGED, I CANT DELETE THEM**
![Feature Image - Outpost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4d90d4190432fc8a8247dfb303d9a4acc8d580_0.webp)
- **_For Now German is incomplete and wont be completed until atleast V2_**
- **Forcebound** adds **Star Wars Themed Content** like **Lightsabers** ,**Blasters** ,**Tatooine** and **Mustafar** to Minecraft **1.21.8**
# **Features :**
  - **Lightsabers in Gold and Steel** with Sounds
  - **ETA2 Ship** to travel to other **Planets** like **Tatooine** and **Mustafar**
  - **Blasters**
  - **Force Abilitys**
  - And More...
- **Crafting Recipes in Tutorial Book and JEI**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# **2.0 Goals :**
  - Mandalorian FINISHED
  - **More Siths**
  - **More Jedis**
  - **Hoth and Endor**
  - **Space-Ship wrecks as Structures**
  - **Small Jedi Tempel**
  - More Blasters FINISHED
  - Lightsaber "Bench" to make them without the crafting Table FINISHED
  - Lightsaber Expansion FINISHED

</details>

- # I and this Mod are not associated with Disney or the Star Wars Brand in any way

## **_LICENSE_**
> 
> **You are Allowed to** :
  - **Use this Mod for Youtube Videos** and such but you have to **credit the Mod** (via a Link or my Username on Modrinth)
  - **Create Resourcepacks without my Permission** that change the Textures/Models that my Mod already has
  - **Create Addons** that extend or modify the content of this mod without including assets of this mod
> **You are NOT Allowed to** :
  -   **Upload the compiled Mod to another Platform without my Permission**
  -   Use my Assets for your Own/Commercial use without my Permission
,you can obtain Permission by DM´ing me on Discord (acnhgamrr)
> Otherwise **all Rules** of the **CC-BY-ND 4.0** License apply
